3332630.name: MADE FOR
3332630.description:
MADE FOR is an episodic video game series where indie studio Raikori makes games for and about your favorite creators!

Free to download and try - each episode is made with love and released as often as we can manage to build them!

In episode one, you follow in the footsteps of legendary creator JackSucksAtLife - someone who made a career out of chasing YouTube's wildest milestone awards. Don't stop until you reach the top: thousands of dollars, dozens of awards, and millions of doting fans!

Episode one takes the form of a cozy idle tycoon game: spend time in your studio, perfecting each video, and watch the numbers climb! Spend your earnings on upgrades to make your entire operation even more efficient.

Rise through the ranks of fictional social media platform VideoGuy as you unlock an increasingly ridiculous number of creator awards. From the humble silver play button to the elusive ruby variant, there's a ton to strive for.

Collect more than just awards: as you upload more, you'll start to achieve unprecedented stardom! Get millions of views on each video - maybe even becoming the number one VideoGuy.

VideoGuy isn't ready for someone with your power. Exploit the trending tab and break the algorithm. Become so popular that even the CEO takes notice, and then break him too.
3332630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
